title: Is Tanvi Sharma's game developing more like Saina Nehwal's?
indian_angle: This article analyzes the playing style of young Indian talent Tanvi Sharma, comparing her to two legendary Indian badminton players.
summary: An in-depth look at the emerging game of Tanvi Sharma, drawing comparisons to the tactical approaches of Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu, and discussing her potential trajectory in Indian badminton.

title: BAI announces Coaches Development Program in Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India is launching a grassroots coaches development program in two key Indian cities to nurture future talent.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued a circular for a Coaches Development Program at the grassroots level, scheduled for Guwahati and Raipur from June 12-21, 2026, aimed at strengthening coaching foundations across the country.

title: Indian shuttlers share FIFA World Cup 2026 team preferences
indian_angle: Top Indian badminton players like Chirag, Prannoy, Ayush, and Sindhu reveal their favorite teams for the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026.
summary: A lighthearted feature where Indian badminton stars such as Chirag Shetty, HS Prannoy, Ayush Shetty, and PV Sindhu discuss which nations they will be supporting in the FIFA World Cup 2026.

title: Coach Tan Kim Her's strategy for Hari-Arjun doubles pairing
indian_angle: This article details how renowned doubles coach Tan Kim Her strategically paired Indian players Hariharan and Arjun, following his success with Satwik-Chirag.
summary: An insight into the coaching philosophy of Tan Kim Her, focusing on his decision to pair Hariharan Amsakarunan and Arjun M.R. in men's doubles, aiming to replicate the success seen with Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.

title: Ayush Shetty challenges World No 15 Weng Hong Yang
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Ayush Shetty put up a strong fight against Chinese World No. 15 Weng Hong Yang, showcasing his potential on the international stage.
summary: Indian shuttler Ayush Shetty delivered a challenging performance against China's World No. 15 Weng Hong Yang, demonstrating his growing prowess in a competitive international match.
